name: com.netsync.unity
description: Unity adapter for the NetSync networking core: TCP+UDP channels, reliable UDP, optional compression and encryption, LAN discovery. The core is a standalone zero-dependency DLL; this package adds MonoBehaviour integration, main-thread event dispatch and Vector/Quaternion serialization.

samples.description: Minimal IMGUI chat over the reliable TCP channel, with LAN discovery.
Server-authoritative transform sync over sequenced UDP (stale snapshots dropped).
